summary: Iteration 53 - Backend testing of Loyalty Promo Codes. All 16 tests PASSED. Features verified: 1) POST /api/loyalty/admin/rewards/{id}/generate-promo creates promo code with correct discount_type, discount_value, valid dates, usage_limit. 2) Generated promo stored in promo_codes collection with source='loyalty_reward' and reward_id. 3) GET /api/loyalty/admin/promo-codes returns loyalty promos with times_used, is_active, valid_to. 4) POST /api/promo-codes/validate works for both percentage and fixed discounts. 5) POST /api/promo-codes/use records usage and increments times_used. 6) usage_limit enforced - rejects when exhausted. 7) per_user_limit enforced - rejects if user already used code.

promo_code_generation_tests.test_01_create_loyalty_reward: PASS - Created test reward with 10% discount
promo_code_generation_tests.test_02_generate_promo_from_reward: PASS - Generated LYL- prefixed code with correct discount_type=percentage, discount_value=10.0, usage_limit=5
promo_code_generation_tests.test_03_verify_promo_code_in_collection: PASS - Promo code stored with source='loyalty_reward', reward_id linked, times_used=0

validation_tests.test_04_customer_validates_code: PASS - Validated code returns discount_type, discount_value, discount_amount (10% of 10000 = 1000)

usage_tests.test_07_admin_sees_updated_times_used: PASS - Admin promo-codes endpoint shows times_used=1
usage_tests.test_08_per_user_limit_rejection: PASS - Validation rejects with 'already used' message

fixed_discount_tests.test_10_generate_fixed_promo_code: PASS - Generated code with discount_type='fixed', discount_value=500.0
fixed_discount_tests.test_11_validate_fixed_discount_calculat: PASS - Fixed discount=500 regardless of order amount

usage_limit_tests.test_14_first_use_succeeds: PASS - First validation and use succeeded
usage_limit_tests.test_15_usage_limit_reached_rejection: PASS - Second validation rejected with 'limit' message

cleanup.test_99_cleanup_test_data: PASS - Test rewards and promo codes cleaned up

features_verified.promo_code_structure: VERIFIED - Generated code has source='loyalty_reward', reward_id, discount_type, discount_value, valid dates, usage_limit
features_verified.admin_promo_codes_endpoint: VERIFIED - GET /api/loyalty/admin/promo-codes returns loyalty promos with times_used, is_active, valid_to
features_verified.customer_validation: VERIFIED - POST /api/promo-codes/validate returns correct discount_amount for both percentage and fixed
features_verified.promo_code_usage: VERIFIED - POST /api/promo-codes/use records usage and increments times_used
features_verified.usage_limit_enforcement: VERIFIED - Promo code rejected when usage_limit exhausted
features_verified.per_user_limit_enforcement: VERIFIED - Promo code rejected when user already used it

critical_code_review_comments: Generate promo endpoint correctly maps reward.type='discount' to discount_type='percentage' and other types to 'fixed'
Promo code generation uses secure random token (LYL-{hex}) with uniqueness check
usage_limit correctly pulled from max_redemptions or total_available with fallback to 50
Validation correctly checks per_user_limit via promo_code_uses collection
Usage recording properly increments times_used on promo_codes collection
seed_data_creation: Test rewards and promo codes created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 verified full loyalty promo code flow. Admin generates promo from reward via POST /api/loyalty/admin/rewards/{id}/generate-promo → creates entry in promo_codes with source='loyalty_reward'. Customer validates via POST /api/promo-codes/validate (works for percentage and fixed). After payment, customer calls POST /api/promo-codes/use?code=X&order_id=Y&discount_amount=Z. Admin views usage via GET /api/loyalty/admin/promo-codes. Both usage_limit and per_user_limit enforced correctly. All backend endpoints working as expected.
